content.en:
Wow!!!

The Lord of the Ruins and the Lord of the True Dragon pierced through the passage and left.

The other bone transformation realms did not dare to go over, after all, they were still a little afraid.

When the Lord of the Ruins and the Lord of the True Dragon have explored the situation of the Land on the other side of Eternity and confirmed the level of danger, it would be better for them to decide whether to go or not!

"I hope that the Lord of the Ruins and the Lord of the True Dragon can come back alive and bring us some good things and information about the land beyond eternity!"

The Lord of the Desolation muttered.

"yes!"

Other bone metamorphoses are nodded one by one.

......

"I'll go over and see the land of eternity!"

Ye Tian decided.

He was now trapped in the stage from the third bone transformation realm to the fourth bone transformation realm, and if he could find an opportunity in the land of eternity, he should be able to break through easily.

So, he wanted to enter the land of eternity.

"The Lord of the Ruins is gone, and my three vests can't be exposed for the time being, and I can't go to the land of eternity, otherwise it will be too suspicious. "

Ye Tian decided to come over in person, forcibly break into the passage, and then enter the land of eternity.

Anyway, with his strength, those bone transformation realms couldn't stop him.

Swish!

Ye Tian quickly shuttled to the Sea of Mixed Ruins.

In an instant, he unleashed the top primeval technique, the primeval eternal true body technique!

He felt that with this top-notch Ancient True Body Technique of the defense class, those bone transformation realms would not be able to break through his defenses.

After all, his current strength is between the ordinary Fifth Bone Transformation Realm and the Sixth Bone Transformation Realm combat power!

"Who?"

A bone changer sensed Ye Tian's arrival, and looked at it one by one.

Then.

Ye Tian used the Ancient God and Demon Spear to break through the defensive and covering formations with one blow, and rushed over.

"Lord of Endless, what are you doing?"

The Lord of the Giant Bone, the Lord of the Desolation, and the Lord of the Desolation asked.

"It's nothing, it's just a bit of a road!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

"Passing by, borrowing the way?"

Where they don't know is clear, it's clear that they broke the barrier of the territorial sea boundary and opened a passage to the land of eternity and exposed!

"Who exposed?"

Many bone transformation realms looked at each other one by one, but they couldn't guess who exposed this matter.

But right now, it makes no sense to find out who is exposed, so it's better to intercept Ye Tian.

They are also afraid that Ye Tian will destroy the passage!

Rumble!!!!

A bone change realm shot.

However.

Boom!

Ye Tian directly shook them away, and forced them through with strong strength.

Ye Tian also ignored the attacks of the other bone transformation realms, and blocked them with the Ancient Eternal True Body Technique, and then shuttled into the passage.

"Guys, you can't stop me with your strength!

After saying this, Ye Tian walked through the passage.

......

"How could the strength of the Endless Lord become so terrifying!"

Many bone transformations are extremely suppressed.

At this time, the Lord of the Giant Bone said: "The cultivation of the Endless Lord has broken through to the three bone transformation realms, I think when we just came here, he was still in the blood transformation realm nine times, and he also broke into the primeval golden light realm, we thought he was dead." As a result, it later became a bone metamorphosis, and now it has become a triple bone metamorphosis. An ancient-level genius of the Three Bone Transformation Realm, his combat power is comparable to that of the top Five Bone Transformation Realm. But the strength of the Endless Lord is not only five bone transformation realms, but also very close to six bone transformation realms. The few primeval techniques he just cast should not be ordinary primeval techniques, but top-notch primeval techniques!"

"The Lord of Endless is too wicked!"

The other bone transformation realms were shocked.

"I feel like he's about to break through to the fourth bone transformation realm, is it a delusion?" asked the Lord of the Desolation.

"It shouldn't be an illusion!" said the Lord of Giant Bones, "I estimate that the Lord of Endless should be at a bottleneck, wanting to break into the land of eternity and find an opportunity to break through. Once he really breaks through, his combat power should be equivalent to between the sixth bone transformation realm and the seventh bone transformation realm, which is even stronger than the current master of the chaos!"

"Damn, we intercepted him, if he really breaks through, he won't come to trouble us, right?"

There is a bone metamorphosis worried.

"Don't worry, the Lord of Endless won't do this!" said the Lord of the Giant Bone.

......

"What a horrible shockcurrent!"

Ye Tian followed the shock flow.

This is the place from the boundary gap of the territorial sea to the land of eternity, and the shock flow from the land of the other side of the eternal sea to the boundary rift of the territorial sea must pass through this shock flow to reach the land of the other side of eternity.

Compared with this shock flow, the shock flow of the boundary gap of the territorial sea is simply a drop in the bucket!

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian continued to attack along the shock current, cut out a path, and kept advancing.

Time passes slowly.

Finally, he broke through the shock current and walked out, to the land of eternity.

The land of eternity.

Ye Tian stepped into here and looked around.

The surroundings were desolate, as if there was nothing.

The energy of the land beyond eternity is very special, with a heavy power, and this heavy power will also bring oppression and impact to living beings.

If the Nine Blood Transformation Realm is here, there is no way to survive at all, and the Bone Transformation Realm is qualified to survive here.

Swish!

Ye Tian left here first.

He didn't see the Lord of the Ruins or the Lord of the True Dragon, and it was clear that these two should have left.

After all, he came a little late, so naturally he couldn't touch them.

Ye Tian didn't leave too far, but stopped not too far from here, then found a boulder fragment, sat cross-legged on it, and then began to copy his body.

He is going to copy a real body copy body, and let the real body copy the body to investigate.

In this case, even if the replica body falls, he can reproduce it again, and there is no need to send the replica body over again from the boundary gap of the territorial waters.

Soon.

Copy the body copy succeeded.

"That's it, let this replica body probe the surroundings!"

Ye Tian muttered.

As a result, not long after flying, he encountered an eternal true beast.

【Eternal True Beast: Eternal Ancient Serpent】

This Eternal Ancient Serpent was very large, and its aura was extremely terrifying.

Judging from the aura, this is an eternal true beast comparable to the four bone transformation realms.

When I came here with an ordinary bone transformation realm, I encountered this eternal true beast with four bone transformation realms, and I hung up directly, because I was not an opponent at all!

"This Eternal Ancient Snake actually has an Ancient-level Ancestral Endowment!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

【Ancient Ancestral Endowment: Swallowing Domain】

Ye Tian didn't say a word, and directly copied the primeval-level ancestor of this eternal ancient snake.

In short, copying more primordial-level ancestral endowments would only be good for him, and there would be no harm.

Rumble!!!

The Eternal Serpent attacked.
